# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.0.0/),
and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).

## [0.8.10] - 2026-07-08

<!-- generated by git-cliff -->

## [0.8.9] - 2026-07-08

### Bug Fixes

- **ffi:** Serialize plugin event payloads to fix cross-cdylib heap corruption ([#602](https://github.com/drasi-project/drasi-core/issues/602)) ([#608](https://github.com/drasi-project/drasi-core/issues/608))
- **dashboard:** De-duplicate rows via row_signature, graceful shutdown, collapsible panel ([#605](https://github.com/drasi-project/drasi-core/issues/605)) ([#607](https://github.com/drasi-project/drasi-core/issues/607))

<!-- generated by git-cliff -->

## [0.8.8] - 2026-06-18

### Refactor

- **reactions:** Unify grpc-adaptive into grpc reaction ([#484](https://github.com/drasi-project/drasi-core/issues/484))

<!-- generated by git-cliff -->

## [0.8.7] - 2026-06-16

### Bug Fixes

- Preserve datetime types from PostgreSQL ([#283](https://github.com/drasi-project/drasi-core/issues/283))

<!-- generated by git-cliff -->

## [0.8.6] - 2026-06-11

### Bug Fixes

- Use shared drop worker thread to prevent TLS destructor race on macOS arm64 ([#518](https://github.com/drasi-project/drasi-core/issues/518))

<!-- generated by git-cliff -->

## [0.8.5] - 2026-06-03

### Features

- **postgres:** Add replay support for checkpoint-based recovery ([#457](https://github.com/drasi-project/drasi-core/issues/457))
- Transient Source WAL Integration (Issue #368) ([#465](https://github.com/drasi-project/drasi-core/issues/465))

<!-- generated by git-cliff -->

## [0.8.4] - 2026-05-22

### Features

- **reactions:** Reaction recovery persistence (#401-#404) ([#459](https://github.com/drasi-project/drasi-core/issues/459))

## [0.8.3] - 2026-05-22

### Miscellaneous Tasks

- Drasi-core workflow improvement part 1 ([#456](https://github.com/drasi-project/drasi-core/issues/456))

## [0.8.2] - 2026-05-21

### Features

- Secret store plugin system with file, keyring, and Azure Key Vault providers ([#460](https://github.com/drasi-project/drasi-core/issues/460))

### Miscellaneous Tasks

- Normalize Apache-2.0 license headers across all .rs files ([#462](https://github.com/drasi-project/drasi-core/issues/462))

<!-- generated by git-cliff -->

## [0.8.1] - 2026-05-20

### Features

- Reaction recovery, bootstrap, and checkpoint persistence (#397, #398, #399, #400) ([#448](https://github.com/drasi-project/drasi-core/issues/448))
- Checkpoint-based recovery for continuous queries (#370, #371) ([#449](https://github.com/drasi-project/drasi-core/issues/449))

<!-- generated by git-cliff -->

## [0.8.0] - 2026-05-12

### Bug Fixes

- Lossless config persistence — preserve ConfigValue envelopes, camelCase keys, and passwords ([#422](https://github.com/drasi-project/drasi-core/issues/422))

### Documentation

- Clarify properties() persistence contract on Source and Reaction traits ([#444](https://github.com/drasi-project/drasi-core/issues/444))

### Features

- **lib:** Implement QueryOutputState with im::HashMap and outbox ring buffer ([#436](https://github.com/drasi-project/drasi-core/issues/436))

### Miscellaneous Tasks

- Release ([#446](https://github.com/drasi-project/drasi-core/issues/446))

<!-- generated by git-cliff -->

## [0.7.0] - 2026-05-11

### Bug Fixes

- Lossless config persistence — preserve ConfigValue envelopes, camelCase keys, and passwords ([#422](https://github.com/drasi-project/drasi-core/issues/422))

- Clarify properties() persistence contract on Source and Reaction traits ([#444](https://github.com/drasi-project/drasi-core/issues/444))
